internshala.cover_letter: I am currently working as a Full Stack Developer at Capgemini with 2 years of hands-on experience building enterprise-grade applications. My core expertise includes Java, Spring, Spring Boot, Microservices architecture, and AWS cloud services, along with Angular on the frontend. I have worked on real-world production systems involving REST API design, service decomposition, and cloud deployments, which has given me strong problem-solving and delivery skills. I am confident that my technical background aligns well with the requirements of this role, and I am eager to bring the same level of quality and dedication to your team. I would love the opportunity to contribute meaningfully and grow further in this position.

freelancer.bid_proposal: Hi, I am a Full Stack Developer with 2 years of professional experience at Capgemini, one of the world's leading IT companies. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, and AWS, and have hands-on experience delivering production-level backend systems and cloud-based solutions. On the frontend, I work with Angular to build clean and responsive user interfaces. I understand the importance of writing maintainable, well-documented code and delivering on time without compromising quality. I have worked in agile teams on complex enterprise projects, so I am comfortable handling requirements, timelines, and client expectations professionally. I would love to discuss your project in detail and show you how I can add real value. Feel free to reach out — happy to get started!
